zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线承压弱势震荡
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD维持弱势震荡格局，价格徘徊于0.145附近略下方，反弹动能不足，整体仍受短线空头压制。盘面缺乏持续放量支撑，市场情绪偏谨慎，结构上仍以整理下行为主导。

MACD柱值为负且继续扩散，显示空头动能占优；价格持续运行在20日均线0.14565下方，均线形成明显压制。短期趋势未见有效修复，反弹更多属于技术性回抽。

下方支撑关注0.14425附近日内低点，一旦失守可能下探至0.14380区域寻求支撑；上方阻力集中在0.14565与0.14600一带，需有效突破才可能扭转弱势结构。

操作上建议以反弹高位承压做空思路为主，靠近阻力区分批轻仓介入更稳健；若价格强势站上0.14600并企稳，则短线空头逻辑失效，需转为观望等待新方向。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is currently exhibiting a weak bearish bias after failing to sustain levels above its short-term moving average. Price action is compressing near the session low around 0.1442, indicating limited bullish momentum and ongoing consolidation. The broader intraday structure suggests sellers remain in control, with lower highs forming and upside attempts quickly rejected near resistance zones around 0.145. Overall trend leans slightly downward in the short term.

Momentum indicators reinforce the bearish tilt. The MACD reading remains negative at -0.0005766, signaling persistent downside pressure and weak recovery strength. With no RSI available, momentum confirmation relies heavily on price structure and MACD divergence. The 20-period SMA at 0.14565285 sits above current price, acting as dynamic resistance. This alignment suggests bearish continuation unless price reclaims the moving average with convincing volume expansion.

Immediate support is forming around the current intraday low near 0.1442, a level that has repeatedly attracted short-term buying interest but remains fragile. A breakdown below this zone opens the path toward 0.1420 as the next structural support. On the upside, resistance is firmly established at 0.14565 aligned with the SMA20, followed by a stronger barrier near 0.1470–0.1500 where prior supply emerged zone.

Short-term traders may favor a cautious bearish approach while price remains below the 20-SMA, prioritizing quick scalps near resistance rather than breakout longs. Risk management is essential given tight price compression and low volatility. A confirmed close above 0.14565 would invalidate immediate bearish pressure and open recovery toward 0.1470. Until then, selling rallies with tight stops above resistance is the more favorable strategy.
